summary.description: Fixed SDC takeover event linkage bugs discovered during Phase 81 audit

bugs.name: Anomaly Detection Index Misalignment
bugs.root_cause: series = df[col].dropna() creates series with different index than df, then df[anomaly_mask] fails

bugs.name: Wrong Manifest Path in Financial Scripts
bugs.root_cause: Scripts loaded from 1.0_BuildSampleManifest (no CUSIP) instead of 1.4_AssembleManifest (with CUSIP)

bugs.name: Missing CUSIP Column in Manifest
bugs.root_cause: CUSIP not included in columns loaded from linked metadata
bugs.fix: Added cusip to column list + CCM enrichment for missing CUSIPs

bugs.name: Empty String CUSIP Handling
bugs.root_cause: Empty strings pass notna() check but fail SDC matching
bugs.fix: Replace empty strings with None after extracting CUSIP6

known_limitations.name: CRSP Memory Constraint
known_limitations.description: Full V1 pipeline hits memory limits during CRSP loading in 3.2_MarketVariables.py
known_limitations.impact: Cannot regenerate market variables from scratch without memory optimization
known_limitations.workaround: Use existing outputs; EventFlags runs standalone and doesn't require full pipeline
